features.name: task with output argument called from always @(*) block
features.description: Code should include a task with an output argument that assigns to the output parameter, called from within an always @(*) block where the output argument is a wire in the calling scope
features.snippet:
always @(*) Test_task(in_data, out_data);
task Test_task; input [15:0] in_d; output [15:0] out_data; begin out_data = in_d; end endtask
